note: Standard FHIR R4 search parameters per resource search pages on build.fhir.org

search_params.name: _id
search_params.documentation: Logical id of this artifact

search_params.name: active
search_params.documentation: Whether the patient record is active

search_params.name: address
search_params.documentation: A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the Address

search_params.name: address-city
search_params.documentation: A city specified in an address

search_params.name: address-country
search_params.documentation: A country specified in an address

search_params.name: address-postalcode
search_params.documentation: A postal code specified in an address

search_params.name: address-state
search_params.documentation: A state specified in an address

search_params.name: address-use
search_params.documentation: A use code specified in an address

search_params.name: birthdate
search_params.documentation: The patient's date of birth

search_params.name: death-date
search_params.documentation: The date of death has been provided and satisfies this search value

search_params.name: deceased
search_params.documentation: This patient has been marked as deceased, or has a death date entered

search_params.name: email
search_params.documentation: A value in an email contact

search_params.name: family
search_params.documentation: A portion of the family name of the patient

search_params.name: gender
search_params.documentation: Gender of the patient

search_params.name: general-practitioner
search_params.documentation: Patient's nominated general practitioner

search_params.name: given
search_params.documentation: A portion of the given name of the patient

search_params.name: identifier
search_params.documentation: A patient identifier

search_params.name: language
search_params.documentation: Language code (irrespective of use value)

search_params.name: link
search_params.documentation: All patients/related persons linked to the given patient

search_params.name: name
search_params.documentation: A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the HumanName

search_params.name: organization
search_params.documentation: The organization that is the custodian of the patient record

search_params.name: phone
search_params.documentation: A value in a phone contact

search_params.name: phonetic
search_params.documentation: A portion of either family or given name using phonetic matching

search_params.name: telecom
search_params.documentation: The value in any kind of telecom details of the patient

search_params.documentation: Logical id of this artifact

search_params.documentation: Reference to the service request

search_params.documentation: The code of the observation type

search_params.documentation: The code of the observation type or component type

search_params.documentation: The reason why the expected value in the element Observation.value[x] is missing

search_params.name: combo-value-concept
search_params.documentation: The value or component value of the observation

search_params.name: combo-value-quantity
search_params.documentation: The value or component value of the observation

search_params.name: component-code
search_params.documentation: The component code of the observation type

search_params.name: component-value-concept
search_params.documentation: The component value of the observation

search_params.name: component-value-quantity
search_params.documentation: The component value of the observation

search_params.documentation: The reason why the expected value in the element Observation.value[x] is missing

search_params.name: date
search_params.documentation: Obtained date/time. If the obtained element is a period, a date that falls in the period

search_params.name: derived-from
search_params.documentation: Related measurements the observation is made from

search_params.name: device
search_params.documentation: The Device that generated the observation data

search_params.name: encounter
search_params.documentation: Encounter related to the observation

search_params.name: focus
search_params.documentation: The focus of an observation when the focus is not the patient

search_params.name: has-member
search_params.documentation: The subject of the observation is a member of the group

search_params.name: identifier
search_params.documentation: The unique id for a particular observation

search_params.name: method
search_params.documentation: The method used for the observation

search_params.name: part-of
search_params.documentation: Part of referenced event

search_params.name: patient
search_params.documentation: The subject that the observation is about (if patient)

search_params.name: performer
search_params.documentation: Who performed the observation

search_params.name: specimen
search_params.documentation: Specimen used for this observation

search_params.name: status
search_params.documentation: The status of the observation

search_params.name: subject
search_params.documentation: The subject that the observation is about

search_params.name: value-concept
search_params.documentation: The value of the observation, if the value is a CodeableConcept

search_params.name: value-date
search_params.documentation: The value of the observation, if the value is a date or period of time

search_params.name: value-quantity
search_params.documentation: The value of the observation, if the value is a Quantity

search_params.name: value-string
search_params.documentation: The value of the observation, if the value is a string
